structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone State Cooling Airflow Setpoint and Heating Coil Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When zone state is cooling, the cooling-loop output maps to active airflow setpoint between cooling minimum and cooling maximum endpoints. Heating coil is disabled unless DAT is below minimum setpoint. If AHU SAT > room temperature, active airflow setpoint is no higher than minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling-loop output to active airflow setpoint from cooling minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. Disable heating coil unless DAT is below minimum setpoint. If supply air temperature from air handler is greater than room temperature, set active airflow setpoint no higher than minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4). a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4). a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4). a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone State Deadband Airflow Setpoint and Heating Coil Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When zone state is deadband, active airflow setpoint is set to minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless DAT is below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Disable heating coil unless DAT is below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4).

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4).
evidence_text: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone State Heating Sequence with Discharge Air Temperature Reset and Airflow Increase
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When zone state is heating, the heating loop maintains space temperature at heating setpoint. From 0% to 50% loop signal, reset DAT setpoint from AHU SAT to MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint, with airflow at heating minimum endpoint. From 51% to 100%, if DAT > room temperature + 3°C (5°F), reset airflow from heating minimum to heating maximum endpoint. Modulate heating coil to maintain DAT at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: From 0% to 50% heating-loop output, reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint; active airflow setpoint shall be heating minimum endpoint. From 51% to 100%, if DAT is greater than room temperature plus 3°C (5°F), reset active airflow setpoint from heating minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint. Modulate heating coil to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop shall maintain space temperature at the heating setpoint as follows: a. From 0% to 50%, the heating-loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. The active airflow setpoint shall be the heating minimum endpoint. b. From 51% to 100%, if the DAT is greater than room temperature plus 3°C (5°F), the heating-loop output shall reset the active airflow setpoint from the heating minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint.

evidence_quote: 5.6.5.3. When the Zone State  is heating , the Heating Loop  shall maintain space  temperature at the heating

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Coil Minimum Discharge Air Temperature in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In Occupied Mode, modulate heating coil to maintain DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate heating coil to maintain a DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: In Occupied Mode, the heating coil shall be modulated to maintain a DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).

evidence_quote: In Occupied Mode, the heating coil shall be modulated to maintain a DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Damper Modulation to Maintain Measured Airflow at Active Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper is modulated by a control loop to maintain measured airflow at the active setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always active when zone is operating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow at the active setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.
evidence_text: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Importance-Multiplier 0 Zones
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Low airflow alarms are suppressed for zones with Importance-Multiplier of 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Zone has Importance-Multiplier of 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan serving zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan serving zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan is proven ON, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position = 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan proven ON

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Valve Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and fan is proven ON, generate Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests from Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone sends cooling SAT reset requests based on temperature exceedance and cooling loop output: 3 requests if zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes; 2 requests if by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes; 1 request if cooling loop > 95% until < 85%; 0 requests otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint or cooling loop > 95%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests if zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes; else send 2 requests if by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes; else send 1 request if cooling loop > 95% until < 85%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Reset Requests from Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone sends static pressure reset requests based on airflow and damper position: 3 requests if measured airflow < 50% of setpoint and damper > 95% for 1 minute; 2 requests if airflow < 70% of setpoint and damper > 95% for 1 minute; 1 request if damper > 95% until < 85%; 0 requests otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow below setpoint and damper position > 95%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests if measured airflow < 50% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper > 95% for 1 minute; else send 2 requests if airflow < 70% of setpoint and damper > 95% for 1 minute; else send 1 request if damper > 95% until < 85%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Coil Disabled During Pulse-Width Modulated Closed Periods
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated per Section 5.2.2, the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled with output set to 0 during closed periods.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated and in closed period
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Disable heating coil and PID loop, set output to 0 during closed periods.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated per Section 5.2.2, the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled, with output set to 0 during closed periods.

evidence_quote: When the airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated per Section 5.2.2, the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled, with output set to 0 during closed periods.
evidence_text: When the airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated per Section 5.2.2, the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled, with output set to 0 during closed periods.
